name: Cass Information Systems, Inc.
description: Cass Information Systems, Inc. is a leading provider of integrated financial and information services. The company helps large organizations manage and pay complex, high-volume invoices for freight, utility, telecom, and waste services. By automating invoice processing, auditing, and payment, Cass enables its clients to reduce operating costs, improve efficiency, and gain valuable business intelligence. Additionally, Cass operates a commercial bank, Cass Commercial Bank, which provides banking services to its corporate clients and specialized markets.
